title: SOP. Sistema Odontológico Privado ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Private Dental System (SOP) is a dental care company located at 19 de Mayo Street, No. 14, Altos, in the city of Bahía Blanca. It was created specifically to provide comprehensive assistance to the various groups comprising the country's social security systems, medical institutions, labor unions, mutual insurance companies, and private companies. By properly administering the Benefit Agreements, with a sense of solidarity and at the lowest possible cost, it provides excellent dental care with full coverage of the Dental Nomenclature. The SOP also aims to prioritize dental prevention.The Private Dental System's coverage area covers the entire Argentine Republic, which is why we provide immediate dental care.- Patients' personal information- documents and medical histories- Company network database- Financial documents- Other information etc.  https://www.sop.com.ar/index.html
